title: Charta: Сasino
description: Blackjack and Texas Hold'em addon for Charta.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3c876ad03ff8727919b807c5ed703168da84d4f.png) A casino addon for [Charta](https://modrinth.com/mod/charta)
--- ## Description Charta Casino Addon extends the base Charta mod with fully playable casino-style card games. Sit down at the table, place your bets, and test your luck, all without leaving Minecraft. ## Games ![Blackjack icon screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/uLt3r1I.png) ### 🃏 Blackjack Classic casino Blackjack against the dealer. Hit, Stand, or Double Down — the goal is to reach 21 without going over. - Multi-player support at a single table - Ace soft/hard hand calculation - Double Down when you're feeling confident - Quick-bet buttons (10 / 25 / 50 / 100 ♦) or enter a custom amount - Live hand-value display with bust and Blackjack indicators ![Blackjack Menu](https://i.imgur.com/A8JQS5b.png)
Blackjack Menu
--- ![Texas Hold'em icon screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/Tf76PMs.png) ### ♠️ Texas Hold'em Full multiplayer Texas Hold'em Poker with community cards, blinds, and a proper betting system. - Fold, Check, Call, Raise, or go All-In - Custom raise amount input with quick-raise chips - Dealer button rotates each round - Showdown phase with automatic hand evaluation - Player status overlay (folded / all-in) visible to everyone at the table
![Texas Hold'em Menu](https://i.imgur.com/e12fD9C.png)
Texas Hold'em Menu
![Texas Hold'em Chips](https://i.imgur.com/miCEfKc.png)
Texas Hold'em Chips on the table
--- ### Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/Deokma/charta-casino-addon/issues If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to write me on Discord @deokma
